creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: wen
Date: Fri Sep 30 06:24:27 UTC 2016
New revision: 422959
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/422959

Log:
  Density, distribution function, quantile function, random generation
  and expected value function for the truncated normal distribution
  with mean equal to 'mean' and standard deviation equal to 'sd'.

  WWW: http://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/truncnorm/

  PR:		213091
  Submitted by:	pfg@

Changes:
  head/math/Makefile
  head/math/R-cran-truncnorm/
  head/math/R-cran-truncnorm/Makefile
  head/math/R-cran-truncnorm/distinfo
  head/math/R-cran-truncnorm/pkg-descr
